mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM project WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} AND id = #{id}) p LEFT JOIN section s ON (p.id = s.project_id) LEFT JOIN image i ON (p.id = i.project_id) LEFT JOIN project_note pn ON (p.id = pn.project_id)
mapper.insert: INSERT section (project_id, about_id, title, content) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{aboutId}, #{title}, #{content})
INSERT image (project_id, about_id, ori_name, saved_name, extension) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{aboutId}, #{oriName}, #{savedName}, #{extension})
mapper.update: UPDATE project SET is_published = 0 ,is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND admin_id = #{adminId};
